message:
fix(restore): remove window_id_from_partial_restore fallback that hid tab failures

The partial-restore fallback attempted to recover a window_id from any
successfully restored pane within a failed tab, then counted the tab as
created. This silently upgraded tab failures into successes, masking
restore issues. Remove the fallback so failed tabs are properly recorded
as failures and trigger continue_on_error checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
